arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea have actually already decided Trevoh Chalobah's future after recalling him from loan
Report: Crystal Palace could bid for £3m defender compared to Rudiger after Chelsea recall Chalobah
Chelsea transfer news: Trevoh Chalobah 'to be recalled' from Crystal Palace loan spell
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly make a decision over whether to recall defender Trevoh Chalobah from his loan spell at Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How Crystal Palace have reacted as Chelsea recall Trevoh Chalobah, plans now being made
Leicester City rivals hit by sudden player recall as frustration clear
arts.sum: Chelsea’s boss, the former Leicester manager Enzo Maresca, gave no hint of the recall when asked about Chalobah earlier this week, saying: “He is a Palace player. Palace boss Oliver Glasner admitted his frustration over the Chalobah situation in his pre-match press conference.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Romain Esse to Bournemouth, Tom Cannon to Sheffield United
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest transfer news and rumours, including Bournemouth's swoop for Romain Esse and Sheffield United's move to sign Tom Cannon.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Crystal Palace Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Leicester will be looking to put an end to a run of five straight Premier League defeats when they host Crystal Palace on Wednesday night. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction...

arts.ttl: Chelsea complete 'impossible' transfer to solve defensive crisis
arts.sum: Chelsea have activated Trevoh Chalobah ’s recall clause from Crystal Palace in a bid to solve their current defensive crisis. David Ornstein reports that the Blues have activated a clause in their loan agreement with Crystal Palace that will bring the 25-year-old defender back to Stamford Bridge prematurely.

arts.ttl: 3 strikers Stoke City must target after Tom Cannon recall confirmation
arts.sum: Stoke City have been dealt a serious blow with Leicester City opting to recall Tom Cannon from his… The post 3 strikers Stoke City must target after Tom Cannon recall confirmation appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy names what Leicester City's new signings must have
arts.sum: Leicester City must sign players with the physicality to cope in the Premier League – but experience of the top flight is not necessary, manager Ruud van Nistelrooy has said. But signing players with Premier League appearances under their belts does not seem like a priority for van Nistelrooy, although the manager does believe there are certain attributes needed to thrive in England.
